center.name: Mountain buzzard
center.summary: Mountain buzzard是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Forest buzzard，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The forest buzzard (Buteo trizonatus) is a species of bird of prey found in Africa, though some authorities have placed it as a subspecies of another species, the mountain buzzard, Buteo oreophilus

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The forest buzzard (Buteo trizonatus) is a species of bird of prey found in Africa, though some authorities have placed it as a subspecies of another species, the mountain buzzard, Buteo oreophilus
